sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal, but cogn. to the roots יָצַב, נָצַב, יָצַע, and יָצַק Hiphil.

Hiphil הִצִּיג (in the manner of verbs פ֞ן) pr. to make to stand, hence-

(1) to place, to set (hinftellen) persons, Gen 43:9 47:2 Jdg 7:5 Jer 51:34 Job 17:6 things, Gen 30:38 Deu 28:56. Trop. to establish, Amo 5:15, “establish right in the gate.”

(2) to put, to place, Jud. 6:37 .

(3) to leave, to let stay (ftehn laffen) Gen 33:15.

Hophal הֻצַּג pass. of Hiph. No. 3. Exo 10:24.
